vocab.meaning: một sự nhảy vọt về trí tưởng tượng
vocab.example: Being an artist requires a leap of imagination to transform a blank canvas into something meaningful.

vocab.meaning: sự chính trực/giữ vững bản sắc trong nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I admire those who maintain their artistic integrity rather than simply creating commercialized works for profit.

vocab.meaning: phản ứng từ tận đáy lòng/bản năng
vocab.example: I find it fascinating how a single sculpture can evoke a visceral reaction from people of completely different cultures.
The ability to convey a narrative through abstract shapes and colors is a skill I would love to master.
It would be intriguing to develop an idiosyncratic style that is instantly recognizable to art enthusiasts.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm giải tỏa cảm xúc
vocab.example: For many, painting is a cathartic experience that allows them to process complex personal struggles.

vocab.meaning: tiên phong/mới lạ và táo bạo
vocab.example: I’ve always been drawn to avant-garde artists who aren't afraid to experiment with unconventional materials.

vocab.meaning: sự lôi cuốn về mặt thị giác/cảm giác
vocab.example: Sculpting has a certain sensory appeal because it involves working with textures and physical dimensions.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: Mastering the interplay of light and shadow is what distinguishes a great painter from a mere amateur.

vocab.meaning: sự kiệt sức/cạn kiệt khả năng sáng tạo
vocab.example: The only downside to being a professional artist is the risk of creative burnout when working under tight deadlines.
